case_title: VISCONTI, MICHAEL vs. RORY, ELIZABETH et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-02-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-02-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1993, OFF CALENDAR

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-17-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO GIVE NOTICE OF CONT'D STATUS CONFERENCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
